reference: I have had a great recovery thus far. I took my twin girls out yesterday afternoon and had to lift the double stroller into my sport utility vehicle. I literally forgot that I even had surgery and just tried to pick it up. It was super heavy and I barely got it in. Last night I woke up to pains in my left abdomen above my scar, and today it is noticeably bigger. Is this something I should be concerned with? I do not go back to the doctor for eleven days and I am afraid it could be something serious.
